knowledgeCandidates.name: Docker container hardening (RO fs + CAP_DROP ALL)
knowledgeCandidates.description: Read-only filesystem, CAP_DROP ALL, non-root uid 998, alpine minimal, health checks. Best Docker hardening in T29 corpus.

knowledgeCandidates.name: Session pool with per-endpoint rate limiting
knowledgeCandidates.description: Multiple sessions rotate on rate limits. Per-session per-endpoint tracking with preemptive backoff.

knowledgeCandidates.name: Parser versioning for unstable APIs
knowledgeCandidates.description: Experimental module allows parallel parser development. Isolates blast radius of upstream API changes.

antiPatternCandidates.name: ADVERSARIAL_DEPENDENCY
antiPatternCandidates.description: Building product on scraping hostile platform. Twitter killed nitter by changing APIs. 12.8K stars, effectively dead.

antiPatternCandidates.name: XSS_IN_CONTENT_RENDERER
antiPatternCandidates.description: Rendering untrusted content without HTML escaping. Karax verbatim bypasses escaping.

antiPatternCandidates.name: SECURITY_HEADERS_ABSENT
antiPatternCandidates.description: No CSP, X-Frame-Options, HSTS in web application. Zero defense-in-depth.

cross_repo_connections.detail: Both proxy/archive web content. ArchiveBox archives pages; nitter proxies Twitter. Both use caching layers.
lux downloads video from Twitter (among others); nitter renders Twitter content. Both scrape Twitter without API.

related_repos.discovery_context: Custom Redis fork pinned in nimble dependencies
